loom1001.title: Feature ID does not match folder name
loom1001.repair: Rename the folder or update feature.yaml so the feature ID matches the folder name.

loom1002.title: Missing or invalid feature manifest field
loom1002.repair: Add the required field to feature.yaml using the canonical manifest shape.

loom1003.title: Manifest action is not exported
loom1003.repair: Create the action file or update the manifest action name.

loom1004.title: Exported action is missing from manifest
loom1004.repair: Add the action name to feature.yaml or remove the action implementation.

loom1005.title: Duplicate route path
loom1005.repair: Change one route path so every route path is globally unique.

loom1006.title: Invalid feature manifest YAML
loom1006.repair: Fix the YAML syntax and run loom verify again.

loom1007.title: Manifest query is not exported
loom1007.repair: Create the query file or update the manifest query name.

loom1008.title: Exported query is missing from manifest
loom1008.repair: Add the query name to feature.yaml or remove the query implementation.

loom1009.title: Manifest view is not exported
loom1009.repair: Create the declared *.view.tsx file or update the route view in feature.yaml.

loom1010.title: Manifest entity is not exported
loom1010.repair: Export the entity from model.schema.ts or update the manifest entity name.

loom1011.title: Invalid feature name
loom1011.repair: Use a lowercase kebab-case feature name such as project-notes.

loom2001.title: Forbidden database import in UI file
loom2001.repair: Move database access into queries/*.query.ts or actions/*.action.ts.

loom2002.title: Forbidden raw fetch in UI file
loom2002.repair: Use the generated loom action/query client.

loom2003.title: Koa import in feature logic
loom2003.repair: Remove the Koa dependency and use LoomRequestContext.

loom3001.title: Action input validation failed
loom3001.repair: Send input matching the action input schema.

loom3002.title: Runtime output validation failed
loom3002.repair: Return a value matching the declared output schema.

loom3003.title: Authentication required
loom3003.repair: Authenticate the request before calling this operation.

loom4001.title: Generated file was manually modified
loom4001.repair: Run loom generate or move custom logic out of the generated file.

loom4040.title: Unknown action
loom4040.repair: Use an action declared in feature.yaml and run loom generate.

loom4041.title: Unknown query
loom4041.repair: Use a query declared in feature.yaml and run loom generate.

loom4050.title: Invalid RPC method
loom4050.repair: Send the action or query request with HTTP POST.

loom5001.title: Missing loom config
loom5001.repair: Create loom.config.ts or run the command inside a loom project.

loom5002.title: Target already exists
loom5002.repair: Choose another name or remove the existing target first.

loom5003.title: Invalid project configuration
loom5003.repair: Use React, Koa, PostgreSQL, pnpm, and explicit featuresDir/generatedDir values.

loom6001.title: Unsupported PostgreSQL field
loom6001.repair: Use a supported scalar field or provide explicit persistence logic.
